task_completion.description: Zotero is open and the 'ML References' collection is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero application window is visible, and the 'ML References' collection is highlighted or selected in the left-hand collections pane.

task_completion.description: The Export Collection dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'Export...' or 'Export Collection' is visible on the screen, typically triggered by right-clicking the collection.

task_completion.description: BibTeX is selected as the export format
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Zotero export dialog, the 'Format' dropdown menu is explicitly set to 'BibTeX'.

task_completion.description: The save location is set to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OS file save dialog is open, and the current directory being saved to is clearly shown as 'Desktop' (e.g., in the path breadcrumbs or sidebar).

task_completion.description: The filename is set to ml_bibliography.bib
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the file save dialog, the 'Name' or 'File name' field contains exactly 'ml_bibliography.bib' before the save button is clicked.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to perform the export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Zotero application interface (menus, right-click context menus, export dialogs) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to manually create or echo the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'echo', 'cat', or 'sqlite3' being used to manually construct the ml_bibliography.bib file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the BibTeX entries into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) being used to manually write the BibTeX entries and save them to the Desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target collection is named 'ML References' and contains exactly 8 foundational deep learning papers.
